name: mimir-temporal-mini
description: Fact-update scenarios for the bi-temporal benchmark. Each entry records a fact that is later overwritten with new content under the same (category, key). The harness writes v1, marks a mid timestamp, writes v2, then checks that as-of time-travel returns the version that was live at a given instant and that current recall is live-only. v1_token / v2_token are substrings unique to each version; probe is a keyword present across versions.

updates.v1: Bonn served as the capital of West Germany until reunification.
updates.v2: Berlin is the capital of the reunified Federal Republic of Germany.

updates.v1: I currently work as a backend engineer at a fintech startup.
updates.v2: I now work as a staff engineer at a robotics company.

updates.v1: The default model for the agent is claude-opus-4-7.
updates.v2: The default model for the agent is claude-opus-4-8.

updates.v1: I usually bike to the office on weekdays.
updates.v2: I take the train to the office now that I moved further away.
